trigger.actions_3_targetA: try to jump before the door stops!

trigger.actions_1_targetA: bosscat1: Step on the plates in following order: 2, 5, 8, 10, 12, 15, 18.

trigger.actions_6_targetA: heal the players which died in acid!

trigger.actions_4_targetA: I think you are dead already.

trigger.actions_5_targetA: The traps are like chocolate, all kids love it :)

trigger.actions_1_targetA: Here is the winnerlist of saw5. These people were added in a random order and most of them didn't win at all.
This map should be played by atleast 2 players...
Ask for your teammates., before you press the button!
try to climb the wall of death!
Who will rate this map with 5 stars?

trigger.actions_2_targetA: how could you run into the only red mark on the fucking field?

trigger.actions_6_targetA: Heal the Players who died in Acid ...

trigger.actions_1_targetA: Thats it. I hate mine fields.
Now lets do some wall jumps, alright, should we?
you just entered your own death.
Now listen up. If you fall down this cliff, you cant be saved. Alright? Lets go!
Well, I take everything back. You are awesome. Now go to the goal and do this shit again.
